name: Broadway Flying J Travel Plaza
description: Independent Broadway-operated Flying J plaza at I-80 Exit 229 with 24/7 dining, showers, laundry, a CAT scale and about 70 paved truck spaces.

name: Love's Travel Stop #978
description: 24-hour Love's travel center at I-80 Exit 280 with Carl's Jr., 6 showers, a CAT scale and about 72 truck parking spaces.

name: Pilot / ONE9 Travel Center #387
description: 24-hour Pilot/ONE9 travel center at I-80 Exit 280 with Subway, 5 showers, a CAT scale and about 60 truck parking spaces.

name: Sinclair Truck Stop (Elko)
description: 24-hour independent Sinclair fuel/truck stop at I-80 Exit 303 with 24-hour diesel, deli, casino and roughly 15 truck parking spaces.

name: Love's Travel Stop #365
description: 24-hour Love's travel center at I-80 Exit 352 with McDonald's, 5 showers, two truck service bays and about 70 truck parking spaces.

name: Flying J Travel Center #692
description: 24-hour Pilot/Flying J travel center at I-80 Exit 352 with 9 showers, a CAT scale and roughly 200 truck parking spaces.

name: Pilot Travel Center #147
description: 24-hour Pilot travel center at I-80 Exit 410 near the Utah line with Arby's, 11 showers, a CAT scale and about 125 truck parking spaces.

name: CAT Scale - Broadway Flying J
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Broadway Flying J plaza at I-80 Exit 229.

name: CAT Scale - Love's Travel Stop #978
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Love's travel center at I-80 Exit 280.

name: CAT Scale - Pilot / ONE9 #387
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot/ONE9 travel center at I-80 Exit 280.

name: CAT Scale - Flying J #692
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J travel center at I-80 Exit 352.

name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #147
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot travel center at I-80 Exit 410.

name: CMC Tire - Elko
description: Commercial, mining and construction tire dealer in Elko offering truck tires, retreading and 24/7 emergency roadside tire service.

name: Sixth Street Car & Truck Wash
description: Self-serve car and truck wash bays in Winnemucca near I-80 Exit 176 (not a full drive-through semi wash).

name: I-80 Truck Scale (Nevada Highway Patrol) - Elko area
description: Nevada has no fixed ports of entry; NHP operates a westbound truck scale on I-80 east of Elko near Halleck (about mile marker 312.5).

name: Beowawe Rest Area
description: Nevada DOT eastbound-only rest area between Battle Mountain and Carlin (near MM 258) with restrooms, RV dump and about 10 commercial truck parking spaces.

name: Pequop Rest Area
description: Nevada DOT bidirectional rest area between Wells and West Wendover (near Pequop Summit, MM 373) with vault restrooms and about 12 commercial truck parking spaces.
